title: Automation One Business Systems Inc ransomware incident

extortion.description: Automation One Business Systems Inc is a leading provider of office equipment solutions in Vancouver, specializing in a wide range of printing products including multifunction printers, document scanners, and mailing machines. The company is dedicated to delivering exceptional customer service and has a highly qualified team of technicians to ensure fast and reliable support. With over 40 years of experience, Automation One offers unbiased consulting services to help clients choose the best solutions for their needs. Their extensive inventory and local presence in Vancouver and Burnaby enable them to minimize downtime and maintain efficient operations for businesses.
